attackDiscoveries.title: Multi-Stage SSH Brute Force and Ransomware Attack
attackDiscoveries.summaryMarkdown: Coordinated attack campaign targeting production infrastructure with brute force, lateral movement, data exfiltration, and ransomware deployment
attackDiscoveries.detailsMarkdown: Attacker from 203.0.113.45 conducted systematic brute force attacks across 15 servers, successfully compromised 5 hosts, established persistence via cron jobs and SSH keys, exfiltrated 4GB+ of database backups and sensitive data, deployed ransomware across multiple hosts, and conducted anti-forensics activities to evade detection. Attack included reconnaissance (port/vulnerability scanning), exploitation (multiple CVEs and injection attacks), privilege escalation, lateral movement, data theft, and finally ransomware deployment with Tor-based C2 communication.

metadata.Title: Large Scale SSH Brute Force Campaign (100 alerts)
